title: acrostichum crispatulum
intro: Acrostichum crispatulum, also known as the fan fern, is a type of fern species that belongs to the family Marattiaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia, where it grows in shaded and humid environments. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues such as skin infections, wounds, and respiratory problems. Acrostichum crispatulum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its health benefits to be harnessed in various ways.
